query: SELECT DISTINCT tenantId, COUNT(*) as total FROM inventoryMovements WHERE DATE(createdAt) = '2026-05-20' GROUP BY tenantId; SELECT DISTINCT wl.tenantId, COUNT(*) as total FROM warehouseLocations wl JOIN inventoryMovements im ON im.fromLocationId = wl.id OR im.toLocationId = wl.id WHERE DATE(im.createdAt) = '2026-05-20' GROUP BY wl.tenantId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 44TTARZqZm4zxSK.b3f2309fec40 --database VPbZo3VRZUT62wWDPHVeqm --execute SELECT DISTINCT tenantId, COUNT(*) as total FROM inventoryMovements WHERE DATE(createdAt) = '2026-05-20' GROUP BY tenantId; SELECT DISTINCT wl.tenantId, COUNT(*) as total FROM warehouseLocations wl JOIN inventoryMovements im ON im.fromLocationId = wl.id OR im.toLocationId = wl.id WHERE DATE(im.createdAt) = '2026-05-20' GROUP BY wl.tenantId;
